title: Big Loot
body:
Pretty straight forward. The diamonds and emeralds are big so if a kid in bedwars accidentally doesn't drop them in the void you can see them.

Use Code `25MAX` at [SparkedHost](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3223) for **25% Off!** SparkedHost has great prices while giving great performance!  
[![Use Code `25MAX` at SparkedHost for 25% Off!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2d9024e8e80e0f3da921b69e3cebab89a1038df_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3223)

<details>
<summary>Q&A:</summary>

Can I put this in my modpack?  
Sure but add the credit. Or just paste the text below
